# Tips180

> Tips180 is one of the most accurate football prediction sites, providing free and premium football tips, correct scores and accumulators across every market, with a focus on Nigerian and African football.

## Key pages

- [Football Predictions Today](https://www.tips180.com/): Today's free football predictions, winning tips and upcoming fixtures.
- [Prediction Accuracy](https://www.tips180.com/accuracy): Transparent, verifiable record of recent winning predictions vs. final results, updated daily.
- [Leagues](https://www.tips180.com/leagues): Predictions by league and competition (Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1 and 100+ more).
- [Our Plans](https://www.tips180.com/our-plans): Premium subscription tiers, pricing and a plans FAQ.
- [About Us](https://www.tips180.com/about-us): Who we are and how we make predictions.
- [How to Pay](https://www.tips180.com/how-to-pay): Payment methods and subscription steps.
- [Contact Us](https://www.tips180.com/contact-us): Support, advert and sponsorship enquiries.

## League hub pages

Each league has a dedicated predictions page at `/leagues/{slug}` (e.g. `/leagues/epl`,
`/leagues/la-liga`) with current fixtures, expert tips and SportsEvent + FAQ schema.

## Notes

- Primary audience: Nigeria and Africa (en-NG).
- Predictions and the accuracy record refresh daily; league hubs use ISR.
- Structured data in raw HTML: WebSite, Organization, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage,
  SportsEvent (per match), plus Person/Article builders for authored analysis.
